page: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the DCadsv6 family. It is powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The configuration features 64 dedicated virtual CPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio with 4.0 GB of memory allocated per core.

This server type includes 2458 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not feature any integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The inclusion of substantial local disk capacity alongside Premium Storage capability provides a foundation for data-intensive operations that do not require hardware acceleration.

From a resource density perspective, the instance offers a balanced allocation of compute and memory resources, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that scale linearly with core count and memory. The combination of 64 dedicated vCPUs, a 256.0 GB memory footprint, and high-capacity local storage makes this instance appropriate for general-purpose enterprise applications, relational databases, and data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance from the DCadsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor, paired with 256.0 GB of system memory to maintain a balanced 1:4 resource ratio. Storage capabilities include 2458 GB of local disk space alongside Premium Storage compatibility, though the instance lacks GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for general-purpose enterprise workloads, database hosting, and data processing tasks that require dedicated compute resources and substantial local storage capacity without the need for specialized graphics hardware.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v6 is a DCadsv6 family server featuring 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, optimized for general-purpose and database workloads under Hyper-V.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure DC64ads_v6 is a general-purpose server with 64 AMD vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage running on Hyper-V.
tagline: A dedicated AMD-powered server featuring sixty-four virtual cores, balanced memory, and high-capacity local storage for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
256.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
2458 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Operates on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Suited for general-purpose enterprise applications and databases
